reviews.comment:
Mucha Soberbia de los despachantes del Shop, malísimo el café, frío y Aguado!!

(Translated by Google)
The staff at the shop were incredibly arrogant, and the coffee was terrible—cold and watery!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach attendants and very helpful.

reviews.comment:
Está bien para ser una estación de servicios, lástima que últimamente están descuidadas, sucias y desprolijas, pero no solo está, sino todas las ACA e YPF por las que uno pasa. Hasta hace un tiempo eran un orgulloso pasar por estos iconos de la Argentina

(Translated by Google)
It's alright for a gas station, it's a shame they've been neglected, dirty, and run-down lately, but it's not just this one, it's all the ACA and YPF stations you pass. Until recently, passing these icons of Argentina was a source of pride.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRMzhLWm9RRRAB

(Translated by Google)
